verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I got a call from an old friend We laughed about how we have changed But I could tell things weren't going as well as he claimed He tried to hide his feelings But they only gave him away The longer I listened the more I kept wishing I knew the right words to say

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Can you reach my friend You're the only one who cares Lord I know you love him Make him understand Can you reach my friend Bring his searching into an end Help him give his heart to you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We talked for more than an hour And I smiled when he mentioned Your name I said that I knew You and told him the difference You'd make He never thought he would need You But maybe he's changing his mind As we said goodbye Lord I've told him that I had found something He'd like to find

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Can you reach my friend You're the only one who cares Lord I know you love him Make him understand Can you reach my friend Bring his searching into an end Help him give his heart Cause maybe he is ready tonight Lord he said that he might Need to call on you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh Oh Can you reach my friend You're the only one who cares Lord I know you love him Make him understand Can you reach my friend Bring his searching into an end Help him give his heart to Help him give his heart to Help him give his heart to You
